summary: The diff contains partial frontend updates to VendorCategoryInput and introduces a backend migration module, but does not provide clear evidence that backend category normalization/de-duplication, empty-category rejection, or exact normalized equality filtering for listPublicVendorsByCategory were implemented. The diff also includes several unrelated frontend features (new routes, links, utilities) not requested in the BuildRequest.

missing_requirements.requirement: Normalize and de-duplicate vendor categories on write in the backend (createVendor and updateVendorProfile), including trimming, whitespace-collapsing, case normalization, and rejecting empty/whitespace-only categories with a clear trap message.
missing_requirements.reason: The provided backend diff snippet does not show changes to createVendor or updateVendorProfile. The added migration normalizes by trimming a single space and lowercasing, but does not show de-duplication, internal whitespace collapse, or rejecting empty/whitespace-only categories with a trap message during writes.
evidence: backend/migration.mo (normalizeCategory only trims ' ' and lowercases; no dedupe/whitespace-collapse/trap)

missing_requirements.requirement: Refine backend category filtering for listPublicVendorsByCategory to use case-insensitive, whitespace-normalized equality (no substring matching).
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence is shown in the backend diff snippet that listPublicVendorsByCategory was changed, nor that substring matching was removed in favor of normalized equality.

missing_requirements.requirement: Improve VendorCategoryInput UX: show suggestions on focus even when empty; resilient keyboard navigation with visible highlight and Enter-to-add; Escape closes and clears highlight; clicking outside closes without removing badges.
missing_requirements.reason: Click-outside handling is present, but the diff is truncated before showing the full key handling and any onFocus logic. There is no explicit evidence that focusing the input opens suggestions when empty, nor that Escape behavior and Enter-to-add highlighted suggestion are fully implemented.
evidence: frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorCategoryInput.tsx (shows click-outside close; keydown handler truncated before full behavior)

hallucinated_features.description: Backend migration module added (data migration runner and old/new actor/vendor types).
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest requirements focus on runtime write normalization and filtering behavior, not adding a migration system/module.
evidence: backend/main.mo (imports Migration and uses (with migration = Migration.run))

hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-4/5/6 and unrelated to vendor category normalization/filtering or VendorCategoryInput UX.

hallucinated_features.description: New public vendor routes and navigation updates (e.g., public Vendors link, /vendors routes).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-4/5/6, which are specifically about backend category normalization/filtering and VendorCategoryInput suggestions/keyboard UX.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (mentions frontend/src/App.tsx new public vendor routes; frontend/src/components/Header.tsx new public Vendors link)

hallucinated_features.description: Multiple unrelated frontend feature changes across the app (marketplace page, admin panel, wallet page, rewards, recommendations, etc.).
hallucinated_features.reason: These are not part of the requested category normalization/filtering and VendorCategoryInput UX improvements.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (multiple entries describing broad app changes beyond REQ-6)
